name: model_check
description: Verify ollama cloud model availability before launching agents. Checks https://ollama.com/api/tags and compares against the agent_pool.json roster.

commands.name: all
commands.description: Check availability of all models in the agent pool

commands.name: required
commands.description: Check only the primary and fallback models for all agent roles

commands.name: agent
commands.description: Check models for a specific agent role
